name: scvelo
tagline: Step-by-step scVelo RNA velocity workflow: preprocessing, stochastic/dynamical velocity estimation, latent time, and driver-gene analysis.
verdict: Concrete, code-heavy scVelo walkthrough with real API calls, defined output fields, and a troubleshooting table; no security issues found. Gaps: no guidance on when NOT to use it (risk of misfiring vs CellRank/dynamo), an unpinned `pip install scvelo`, and heavy scanpy usage that is never declared as a dependency.

highlights.summary: Line 14: `pip install scvelo` has no version pin; scvelo is a well-known official-registry package, so warning not fail.
No 'NOT for' / exclusion text anywhere; no guidance distinguishing scVelo from adjacent tools like CellRank, dynamo, Monocle/Slingshot.
scanpy (`sc.pp.neighbors`, `sc.read_h5ad`, etc.) is used throughout but never declared as a dependency or availability-checked.
